timeline.title: Project update
timeline.summary: Dec 16th 2024 First we started discussion about if it would be possible to get results by April. The collaborators do not have enough experience with MHCII With the company (Valo therapeutics) the results take a bit longer, but they have experience with MHCII. We need to make a collaboration agreement. Viccenzo lab can do the contract. We could get results maybe by the end of March. Cell suspension or frozen tissue is good. The gold standard is 1g of tissue. Funding discussion Jacopo could also

methods: The analysis scripts are in the repository https://github.com/farkkilab/devNKI-scripts

document_index.name: Note immuno peptidomics 20241216.docx
document_index.title: Dec 16th 2024
document_index.excerpt: First we started discussion about if it would be possible to get results by April. The collaborators do not have enough experience with MHCII With the company (Valo therapeutics) the results take a bit longer, but they have experience with MHCII. We need to make a collaboration agreement. Viccenzo lab can do the contract. We could get results maybe by the end of March. Cell suspension or frozen tissue is good. The gold standard is 1g of tissue. Jacopo could also do exploration of MHCI Please contact Valio therapeutics

document_index.name: README.docx
document_index.title: Brief description
document_index.excerpt: This folder contains files related with the whole slide tissue tCycif staining for the validation of NKI project results and for the TRIBUS validation set The samples correspond to the Oncosys-ova cohort and were selected by Ada and Anniina. The description of the panel used is in the file ‘Copy of 4_2_NKI_exp.xlsx’ Any questions about this files ask: Copy of 4_2_NKI_exp.xlsx - File that describes the panel used and the list of samples used. Logic_table_Ada_Fernando_tribus.xlsx - Logic table to annotate cells using TRIBUS. The data is in the workstation DH9-3049-11090 Where are the analysis scripts The analysis scripts are in the repository https://github.com/farkkilab/devNKI-scripts

Instructions:
1) Please select 12 samples labeled in blue ! It is okay to take around 0.5-1g (higher weight for lower purity if possible). For S050_iAdn, please select ~0.3g

me 0.3 2xRNA, 2xDNA, 2xProtein Box13 E2-E7 0.06, 0.1, 0.06, 0.16 too little
Instructions:
1) Please select 12 samples labeled in blue ! It is okay to take around 0.5-1g (higher weight for lower purity if possible). For S050_iAdn, please select ~0.3g
2) Please label tubes and collect tubes per each sample seperately and place them on dry ice for transportation
3) Pick-up will be done by Cerrulo's lab on 8/1/2025 at 11 am (event is added to Lab calendar)

Dec 16th 2024
First we started discussion about if it would be possible to get results by April.
The collaborators do not have enough experience with MHCII
With the company (Valo therapeutics) the results take a bit longer, but they have experience with MHCII. We need to make a collaboration agreement. Viccenzo lab can do the contract.
We could get results maybe by the end of March.
Cell suspension or frozen tissue is good. The gold standard is 1g of tissue.
Funding discussion
Jacopo could also do exploration of MHCI
Please contact Valio therapeutics
Espectra

Brief description
This folder contains files related with the whole slide tissue tCycif staining for the validation of NKI project results and for the TRIBUS validation set
The samples correspond to the Oncosys-ova cohort and were selected by Ada and Anniina. The description of the panel used is in the file ‘Copy of 4_2_NKI_exp.xlsx’
Any questions about this files ask:
Fernando Perez
Ada Junquera
Ziqi Kang
File description
Copy of 4_2_NKI_exp.xlsx - File that describes the panel used and the list of samples used. 

Logic_table_Ada_Fernando_tribus.xlsx - Logic table to annotate cells using TRIBUS.
Where is the data
The data is in the workstation DH9-3049-11090
In the folder: 
Where are the analysis scripts
The analysis scripts are in the repository https://github.com/farkkilab/devNKI-scripts
